decision: Treated the Phase 2 round-2 challenge blocker (Phase 1 primitive 'not found in tree') as an environmental false positive — caused by the interrupted session having checked the working copy back to main — resolved it by restoring the nc-750-phase8-settings-feedback branch, folded only the one trivial minor finding into the brief, and advanced to the approval gate instead of running a third plan-challenge round.
alternative_not_taken: Running a ceremonial round-3 challenge to obtain a clean 'pass' verdict on the corrected tree.
rationale: The blocker was provably a working-tree artifact, not a brief defect: the branch carries the committed Phase 1 ActionStatus.ts + plan files, and the critic had already verified all four real design findings (B1/M2/M3/M4) resolved on the soundness and ethos axes. A third round would only re-confirm a file's existence, burning a bounded round for no design value. Recorded the branch-state hazard as a dogfood finding instead.
